title: Stimoryne reitzii
taxonomy: Stimoryne reitzii is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is classified as a member of the genus Stimoryne, which is a group of plants that are native to the Americas. The family Boraginaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. The classification of Stimoryne reitzii is based on its morphology, genetics, and other characteristics that distinguish it from other species in the same genus.
